rationale: The France-Germany joint fighter jet program collapse is a new signal of European defense fragmentation, relevant to Romania's security dependence on NATO and EU cohesion near its eastern border.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans crash: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: Collapse of the Franco-German FCAS program weakens EU defense integration, a concern for Romania which relies on NATO and EU solidarity for security against Russian pressure on its border.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran deal stalemate continues, keeping mild upward pressure on energy costs relevant to Romanian households; no new development beyond the known impasse.

top_events.title: Riots, violence, hate: Anti-immigrant unrest in Belfast
top_events.summary: Anti-immigrant unrest in Belfast is a distant EU social tension story; Romania monitors migration dynamics but this has no direct impact on Romanian residents.
